hero.title: Online booking and client management for beauty professionals
hero.description: Seene gives beauty professionals a personal booking page, a convenient calendar and a client database. Clients book via your Instagram link — no calls, no back-and-forth.
hero.microtext: No online payments. No extra setup. Just what you need every day.

q1.question: How will clients book with me?
q1.answer: You get a personal link (e.g. seene.app/your-name). Add it to your Instagram bio — clients can pick a time and book themselves.

q2.question: Do clients need to install an app?
q2.answer: No. Seene works in the browser — for you and your clients. Nothing to install.

q3.question: Can I use it for free?
q3.answer: Yes, the free plan includes all the essentials: your booking page, online scheduling and a calendar. The Pro plan adds advanced features.

q4.question: How do I set up my schedule?
q4.answer: In your Seene dashboard you set your working days, hours and breaks. Clients only see the slots that are available.

q5.question: What happens to my data if I delete my account?
q5.answer: You can export all your data (clients, booking history) before deleting your account. After deletion, all data is permanently removed from our servers.

finalCta.title: Create your page and start accepting bookings today
finalCta.microtext: Free. No card required. Your page is ready in 5 minutes.
